news.headline: Huawei's Li Peng highlights maximizing value from experience with 5.5G at MWC Shanghai 2024. Keynote focuses on carriers' potential.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024 in Shanghai, Li Peng, Corporate Senior Vice President and President of ICT Sales & Service at Huawei, spoke at MWC Shanghai 2024 about optimizing the benefits of 5.5G for carriers. The keynote underscored the importance of industry-wide collaboration in this effort, reflecting significant progress in this area.

news.headline: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals promotes Avenova products with discounts for Dry Eye Awareness Month.
news.summary: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Emeryville, California, listed on NYSE American as NBY, has revealed plans to provide exclusive promotions and price reductions on its Avenova® eyecare items to consumers and eyecare specialists in July in honor of National Dry Eye Awareness Month. This initiative aims to highlight the significance of maintaining eye health for overall well-being and to raise public awareness regarding dry eye condition. The Sjögren's Foundation and collaborating entities initially proposed this endeavor.

news.headline: Lindsay Corporation raises quarterly cash dividend by 3% to $0.36 per share, payable on Aug 30, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Omaha, Nebraska, Lindsay Corporation (NYSE: LNN), known for manufacturing and distributing irrigation and infrastructure equipment, recently shared news of a dividend declaration. The Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on August 30, 2024. Shareholders recorded as of August 16, 2024, will be eligible for this dividend. This new quarterly cash dividend marks a three percent increase from the prior rate of $0.35 per share.

news.headline: BCC Research shares 7 insights on IIoT market. Reveals key trends and growth drivers. Boston, June 28, 2024. (Character count: 99)
news.summary: In a recent report, BCC Research highlighted key trends, innovations, and industry changes in the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) market. The analysis, released on June 28, 2024, in Boston, pointed out crucial growth drivers and future prospects in this sector. The report emphasized the significant advancements in industrial environments, stressing the importance of staying abreast of developments in this rapidly evolving landscape.

news.headline: CKGSB highlighted its thought leadership at WEF in Dalian, China on June 25-27, 2024. Global leaders gathered for "Summer Davos Forum."
news.summary: The annual World Economic Forum Meeting of the New Champions, also known as the "Summer Davos Forum," took place in Dalian, China from June 25 to 27, 2024. The event drew global leaders across different industries to discuss pressing economic issues. Notable speakers included Dean, and others who shared insights on key topics.

news.headline: SuperMap AI Foundations showcased AI and geospatial intelligence at GISTC 2024 in Beijing on June 25, focusing on quality development.
news.summary: In Beijing on June 25, 2024, the 2024 Geospatial Intelligence Software Technology Conference (GISTC 2024) started at the China National Convention Center. The conference focuses on "Geospatial Intelligence, Driving Quality Development" and is scheduled for two days.

news.headline: OpenAI reveals CriticGPT to detect GPT-4 errors; assists trainers in identifying mistakes in ChatGPT during RLHF.
news.summary: OpenAI has unveiled CriticGPT, a new tool specifically developed for critiquing responses generated by ChatGPT. The primary purpose of CriticGPT is to assist human trainers in identifying errors more effectively during reinforcement learning and human feedback loops. This innovation aims to streamline the training process and improve the quality of responses produced by ChatGPT.

news.headline: DPC Dash Ltd, Domino's Pizza China's master franchisee, now operates 900 stores in Mainland China.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Hong Kong, DPC Dash Ltd - Domino's Pizza China, listed as 1405.HK, operates as Domino's Pizza's sole master franchisee in China Mainland, Hong Kong, and Macau.

news.headline: AB Science updates on application for conditional marketing approval of masitinib in ALS; important step in treatment with 30,000 new cases/year.
EURneffy, a needle-free adrenaline nasal spray, recommended for approval by CHMP in Europe for treating anaphylaxis, potentially being the first option.
news.summary: EURneffy has the potential to become the initial and sole needle-free adrenaline alternative sanctioned for addressing allergic reactions (anaphylaxis) in Europe.

news.headline: Well Intervention Market to grow from $9.2 billion in 2024 to $11.3 billion by 2029, CAGR of 4.2% - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: As of June 28, 2024, the Well Intervention Market has been valued at approximately $9.2 billion. Analysts project that by 2029, this market is expected to increase to $11.3 billion, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.2% during this period. This information is derived from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™. Well intervention services continue to play a significant role in the industry, with a positive outlook for future growth.

news.headline: School District of Philadelphia partners with Imagine Learning for literacy training, advancing educators' skills.
news.summary: The School District of Philadelphia (SDP) held a Summer Institute in Philadelphia on June 28, 2024, with backing from Imagine Learning. The event aimed to provide educators with advanced literacy training and resources. The training was conducted in-person, focusing on implementing innovative teaching methods. Through this initiative, SDP aimed to equip educators with valuable skills to enhance literacy education.

news.headline: French inflation decreased to 2.5% in June from 2.6%, according to ECB's Villeroy, signaling progress in disinflation.
Villeroy of ECB: Approach in monetary policy aligns with increasing focus on projected outlook and less on real-time data.
ECB's Villeroy cautions against overreacting to volatile data till year-end due to inherent noise.
Villeroy from ECB reports smaller data surprises and minor revisions.
ECB's Villeroy emphasizes importance of data-driven decisions over flash.
BrightView Holdings will participate in CJS Securities Investor Conf on July 10, 2024 in White Plains, NY at 9:20 am ET.
news.summary: In Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV), the top commercial landscaping services firm in the U.S., disclosed participation of key executives at an investor conference. The management team members, including Dale Asplund (President and CEO) and Chris Stoczko (VP of Finance), will be at the CJS Securities 24th Annual New Ideas Summer Conference. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, July 10, 2024, in White Plains, New York, kicking off at 9:20 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: ECB's Villeroy expresses growing confidence in forecast, indicating positive outlook.
Villeroy of ECB: Focusing on gradual, pragmatic measures.
ECB's Villeroy states we should overlook minor fluctuations in disinflation.
ECB's Villeroy suggests keeping the inflation target at 2% for now. Flexibility to be reviewed next year.
Bitcoin's price rose by 0.5% following the US presidential debate. Analysts believe a Trump re-election could improve regulatory conditions.
news.summary: Analyzing the potential impact of a reelection for Donald Trump, experts at Bitfinex stated to Decrypt that it could lead to a change in regulatory conditions to be more beneficial.

news.headline: World's first acoustic transparent Cinema LED screen launched in Nanjing, China on June 26, 2024, paving way for commercial film tech.
news.summary: In Nanjing, China, on June 26, 2024, the first acoustic transparent Cinema LED screen was revealed at Xinjiekou International Cinema in Nanjing Deji Plaza. This event marked a significant milestone in cinema technology, as it became the first of its kind in the world. The LED screen launch took place at a renowned cinema venue, highlighting the innovation and advancement in the industry.

news.headline: Mirandus Development Roadmap: Key goals for Q3-Q4 2024 announced by Gala Games, focusing on progress and the game's future. (Read More)
news.summary: Gala Games has detailed significant milestones for the progress of Mirandus throughout the third and fourth quarters of 2024. The focus is on achieving gradual successes and advancing towards the game's upcoming developments.

news.headline: Italy's non-EU Flash Trade Balance sees actual 5.77B, exceeding previous 4.91B forecasted in reports.
Tencent Music Entertainment Group reveals 2024 AGM poll results in Hong Kong. Key: TME, 1698 (NYSE) - PRNewswire.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Tencent Music Entertainment Group (TME), a prominent online music and audio entertainment platform in China, held its annual general meeting (AGM) in Hong Kong. This company, listed on the NYSE as TME and on the HKEX as 1698, shared updates and insights during this event. TME is a key player in the industry, providing various music and audio entertainment services to its vast user base. The AGM served as a platform for TME to discuss its performance and plans for the upcoming year.

news.headline: Germany's gov't rep is confident on 0% tariffs for electric vehicles with China by July 4th.
Duke Health in North Carolina is the first to offer Sedation-Free TNE with EvoEndo® Endoscopy System to patients five and older.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, EvoEndo®, Inc. unveiled that Duke Health is pioneering Sedation-Free TNE (Transnasal Endoscopy) for the Upper Gastrointestinal (GI) Tract in North Carolina. This innovative approach, utilizing the EvoEndo® Single-Use Endoscopy System, is now available to patients aged five and above. John Lyles, Assistant Professor at Duke University's Department of Pediatrics, expressed enthusiasm about being the inaugural provider in the region to offer such advancements in patient care. This development marks a significant step forward in enhancing medical procedures and patient experience at Duke Health.

news.headline: Petco Love promotes Love Lost platform for lost pets before July 4th, with animated video featuring celeb voices.
news.summary: A popular national nonprofit has debuted an animated video titled 'Fireworks Fiasco', which includes dogs voiced by well-known personalities Christina Applegate and Mark Consuelos. Released on June 28, 2024, in San Antonio, the nonprofit, Petco Love, encourages individuals who have lost or found a pet to utilize their Love Lost program, which operates on a national scale. Remember to reach out for assistance and support in such cases.

news.headline: Japan's Ministry of Finance reported no intervention in forex market in the past month.
Fed's Barkin emphasizes adaptability, stresses need for adjustments in response to changing data.
GreenPower Park urges next UK govt to boost battery industry, attract overseas investment. Vital for competitiveness.
news.summary: It is imperative for the upcoming administration to swiftly implement measures to attract international battery manufacturers to the UK. Securing a stable supply of battery cells is crucial for the country's competitiveness and economic prosperity. The necessity for batteries goes beyond the automotive sector, with a growing demand in various industries. This move is essential for ensuring the UK's future success, with the need for a robust strategy to bring in global battery manufacturers, highlighting the significance of this initiative for the nation's economic growth and competitiveness in the international arena.

news.headline: Negative opinion issued on renewal of Translarna™ (ataluren) authorization; PTC to request re-examination. (Chars: 97)
news.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTCT) will propose a re-examination following a recent announcement on June 28, 2024, in Warren, N.J. The Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) has given a negative opinion on the extension of the conditional marketing authorization for Translarna™ (ataluren). This decision impacts the future availability of the medication for patients. PTC plans to officially request a re-evaluation regarding this matter.

news.headline: BlueVoyant wins multiple Microsoft Security Partner awards, including Worldwide & US titles, for third time.
news.summary: BlueVoyant, a renowned cybersecurity firm, received esteemed recognition as the winner of Microsoft United States Security Partner of the Year for the third consecutive year, as well as claiming the title of Microsoft Canada Security Partner of the Year. The company's achievements were highlighted in New York on June 28, 2024, as announced through a press release via PRNewswire. This acknowledgment showcases the company's commitment to excellence in the cybersecurity sector and underscores their reputation for delivering top-notch services.

news.headline: IDEAYA Biosciences announces inducement grants under Nasdaq listing rule 5635(c)(4) on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, IDEAYA Biosciences, Inc., located in South San Francisco, made an announcement about their commitment to discovering and developing targeted therapeutics in the field of precision medicine oncology. The company, listed under NASDAQ as IDYA, shared that on June 27, 2024, the Compensation Committee of IDEAYA took significant steps, reflecting their dedication to advancing in this sector.

news.headline: Quhuo's homestay sector sees sales surge during Labor Day holiday in China, showing impressive growth year-on-year.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Quhuo Limited (NASDAQ: QH), a prominent gig economy platform for local life services in China, announced remarkable progress in its homestay division during the 2024 Labor Day holiday period. The company experienced substantial improvements in this sector, demonstrating its commitment to enhancing services and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: High Tide opens 2 new Canna Cabana stores in Alberta and Saskatchewan, expanding its retail presence.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on June 28, 2024, High Tide Inc. (Nasdaq: HITI; TSXV: HITI; FSE: 2LYA) disclosed its latest news regarding the Canna Cabana retail operation. High Tide, a prominent player in the cannabis industry, aims to provide substantial value through retail outlets.

news.headline: Bitget launching social campaign in Vietnam to educate on crypto safety, targeting fraud prevention.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles on June 28th, 2024, Bitget, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 firm, is set to initiate an exclusive social initiative in Vietnam. This endeavor is designed to provide education to individuals on the secure utilization of cryptocurrency and to mitigate fraudulent activities through interactive and comprehensible means.

news.headline: Global CCUS Absorption Market to reach $1.7 billion by 2030 as per report by MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: A report on the CCUS Absorption Market, released on June 28, 2024, forecasts significant growth until 2030. The market is categorized by Absorption Type into Chemical Absorption and Physical Absorption, and by End-Use Industry including Oil & Gas, Power Generation, Chemical & Petrochemical, Cement, and Iron & Steel sectors. It is projected to witness substantial expansion across various regions worldwide.

news.headline: IED launches 10 new courses focusing on design for social impact in Milan, aiming to improve the world through creativity and innovation.
news.summary: Ten new courses have been launched, inspired by the DesignXCommons manifesto, aiming to explore the role of design in creating a more equitable and inclusive future. This initiative, introduced on June 28, 2024, by IED, emphasizes the transformative power of design in addressing societal challenges and fostering change. The courses are designed to equip students with the necessary skills and knowledge to drive innovation and promote diversity in various fields.

news.headline: Spineart appoints Laurent Nodé-Langlois as CTO to head enabling technologies business unit. Based in US.
news.summary: Spineart, a rapidly expanding firm focusing on spine surgery advancement, has recently appointed Laurent Nodé-Langlois as its Chief Technology Officer on June 28, 2024. Laurent will now be stationed in the United States, overseeing technological developments for the company.

news.headline: 33% in "Sandwich Generation" credit circumstances for home purchase; 17% Americans care for children and parents/grandparents simultaneously.
news.summary: Research conducted by Realtor.com® found that around 17% of Americans are part of the Sandwich Generation, meaning they are currently providing care for both their children under 18 and their parent(s)/grandparent(s) simultaneously. This translates to approximately 1 out of every 6 Americans facing the challenges of managing the needs of multiple generations within their family. The study, which was released from Santa Clara, Calif., on June 28, 2024, highlights the significant impact of this caregiving responsibility on a substantial portion of the population.

news.headline: Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. (NYSE: TPH) will announce Q2 2024 earnings on July 25, 2024 at 7:00 AM PT with execs hosting call.
news.summary: Incline Village, Nevada, June 28, 2024 - Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. (NYSE: TPH) has disclosed that its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2024 will be made public before the market commences on Thursday, July 25, 2024. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 7:00 AM Pacific time (10:00 AM Eastern time) to review these results. Conducting the call will be Doug Bauer, the Chief Executive Officer, Tom Mitchell, the Chief Operating Officer, Glenn Keeler, the Chief Financial Officer, and Linda Mamet, the Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer.

news.headline: Global retirement communities market to grow by USD 394.5 billion from 2024-2028 at 4.25% CAGR due to rising life expectancy.
news.summary: According to Technavio, the global market for retirement communities is projected to increase by USD 394.5 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of around 4.25% during this period. This growth is primarily attributed to the increasing life expectancy worldwide, indicating a rising trend in the demand for retirement community services.

news.headline: Official says cautious approach will be taken with policy decisions.
Barkin: Open to idea that rate hikes may not be hurting economy as much, due to strong performance.
Official suggests providers in service and shelter sectors can raise prices further, citing sufficient room for hikes.

Dawn Zhou's 9169601 Canada Inc. buys 15,168,750 units at $0.16 per unit for $2,427,000 in Abasca Resources private placement.
news.summary: SASKATOON, Saskatchewan, June 28, 2024 - Dawn Zhou, the President and CEO of Abasca Resources Inc. (TSXV: ABA), disclosed that on June 27, 2024, 9169601 Canada Inc. ("916") purchased 15,168,750 units of Abasca at $0.16 per unit in connection with a non-brokered private placement, totaling $2,427,000. Each unit contains one flow-through common share and half a common share purchase warrant. The warrant allows the holder to buy a non-flow-through common share at $0.20 per share within 24 months. The company's address is #208 - 211 4th Avenue North, Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, S7K 2L8.
